dialogue_sequence.speaker: hero

choices.text: Start the stream - time to hustle!

dialogue_sequence.speaker: sarah

dialogue_sequence.speaker: sarah

dialogue_sequence.speaker: sarah
dialogue_sequence.text: Small following, grinding every day, watching others succeed...

dialogue_sequence.speaker: sarah
dialogue_sequence.text: Then I found something that changed EVERYTHING 💕

dialogue_sequence.speaker: hero
dialogue_sequence.text: [You feel a flutter of hope. Someone sees you.]

dialogue_sequence.speaker: sarah
dialogue_sequence.text: OMG I'm so glad you asked! 💕

dialogue_sequence.speaker: sarah
dialogue_sequence.text: It's not an MLM - it's direct social commerce!

dialogue_sequence.speaker: sarah
dialogue_sequence.text: I made $12,000 last month working 2 hours a day!

dialogue_sequence.speaker: sarah
dialogue_sequence.text: Here's a screenshot from my dashboard!

dialogue_sequence.speaker: narrator
dialogue_sequence.text: The screenshot shows impressive numbers.

dialogue_sequence.speaker: narrator

dialogue_sequence.speaker: sarah

dialogue_sequence.speaker: sarah
dialogue_sequence.text: Are you ready to level up? 🚀
